description: Curated Lupine Science brand stills and result graphic pack. Each entry carries motif, aspect ratio, recommended usage, and brand compliance notes.

motifs.name: Shape of Wrongness
motifs.description: Scattered error vectors resolving onto a single luminous indigo ribbon — the central thesis motif.

motifs.name: Bits → Atoms
motifs.description: Pixels and glyphs dissolving into a crystalline lattice.

motifs.name: Upstream Cascade
motifs.description: A single point of indigo light rippling through a sparse lattice.

motifs.name: Crystalline Form
motifs.description: Abstract mineral-like structures rendered in paper and indigo.

motifs.name: Diffraction
motifs.description: Wave interference patterns suggesting measured fields and correction layers.

assets.notes: Primary wide hero. Strong negative space on the right for headline overlay.
OG / social square. Ribbon anchors lower-left.
Subtle background for title cards and section dividers.

patterns.notes: Procedural hyper-ribbon manifold on paper; use as a light slide or section background.
Error vectors converging toward alignment; use for methodology or proof slides.
Subtle lattice dot texture for article or deck backgrounds.
Hyper-ribbon on dark ground for pitch decks and dark-mode surfaces.

deckSystems.name: Dark pitch deck tokens
deckSystems.notes: CSS design tokens and slide layout classes for 1280×720 dark decks.

deckSystems.name: Dark deck sample
deckSystems.notes: Two-slide sample demonstrating the dark token system.

resultGraphics.title: Refrigerant GWP comparison
resultGraphics.description: 100-year GWP of common refrigerants vs. CO₂, aligned to IPCC AR6.

resultGraphics.title: Non-CO₂ climate forcers
resultGraphics.description: Share of current anthropogenic radiative forcing from CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, and halocarbons.

resultGraphics.title: The 0.2% synthesis funnel
resultGraphics.description: Predicted crystals → validated syntheses → commercial cells.

resultGraphics.title: Lean theorem inventory
resultGraphics.description: Build-locked theorem count over the climate-series formalization pushes.

resultGraphics.title: Participation ratio
resultGraphics.description: Error concentration range on the joint error manifold for classical potentials and foundation MLIPs.

resultGraphics.title: Cross-MLIP cosine
resultGraphics.description: Cosine similarity of dominant error vectors across elements.

resultGraphics.title: Elements transfer geometry
resultGraphics.description: Classical → MLIP preservation of manifold shape across 15 elements.
